PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

BattingOrder.description: Where the player batted in the lineup for the game (1;2;3; etc.)

Position.description: Player's position in the starting lineup (if started); otherwise the position he substituted for

Starting.description: Indicates if this player is starting. Note: started = 1 and non starting= 0

Confirmed.description: Indicates if batting order has been confirmed (true/false)
